nation: Chippewas of the Thames First Nation
economic_notes: Investment in Garden Variety (retail cannabis stores in Manitoba, 6.5% ownership via 10552763 Canada Corp, total contributions $450,690). Development Corporation operates four solar farms. Green Lane Landfill revenue share agreement with City of Toronto (40% of tonnage royalties). Big Bear Creek Trust settlement funds (~$120M in investments). COVID-19 impacts noted.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED: Development Corporation (wholly-owned subsidiary) financials for 2019, 2020, and 2021 were not available; only 2018 audited figures (by another firm) are included in consolidation. Prior year figures restated for three items: (A) ISC Fourplex funding receivable correction -$262,584; (B) Big Bear Creek community development income understatement +$285,933; (C) Province of Ontario tobacco project revenue +$180,000. Big Bear Creek Trust (~$120M) and Land Claim Trust are administered trusts not on balance sheet. Development Corporation has outstanding demand loan of $2,056,302 at prime+1.5%. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + Big Bear Creek + Stepping Stones + Health Canada + Southern First Nations Secretariat + Province of Ontario + CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative + CMHC subsidy + Union of Ontario Indians + CMHC housing repair funding. OSR = total revenue minus estimated government transfers.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
